{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032412074954F5E3A266B88C520CCE"}"},"total":46},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7587662300241675033","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，虽然是神豪文，但不是无脑神豪，很久没看职场文了，文笔很流畅，再增加点幽默感就好，但是，反派坏的不彻底，现实中这些人更坏"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766643726,"group_id":"7576134990182747160","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不执着于眼前，才会不沦陷于当下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+m6+/S/zffAKohQXeodqmc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ca0c9de85bc543ee92a30e191dd6c73a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776874098&x-signature=cQnt89nl93A5V0FK8JCZCvVEjMg%3D","user_id":"4142309730","user_name":"果皮鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4142309730","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7576134990182747160","book_info":{"abstract":"分数刚出，会涨。
林峰在公司被疯狂压榨，准备辞职时，绑定了职场返现系统，但是要为公司花钱才能返现。
压榨成这样还要给公司花钱，我才不……花，当然要花，公司花钱把30%利润，我花钱十倍利润。
这年头赚钱如吃翔，花钱还不容易。
林峰开启疯狂花钱模式。
跟女神出差，住七星级总统套房。
跟美女老板谈合作，自掏腰包送顶级产品当见面礼。
跟大佬客户吃饭，偷偷买下200万的餐费。
公司大厦涨租，就大楼买下来，当老板的房东。
干掉经理，赶走总监，换个老板，全司薪水翻倍。
领导傻了，老板懵了，行业大佬追着嫁女儿。
房产大佬：“我兄弟的背景能通天。”
美女老板：“你家一定是万亿豪门，我爸让我嫁给你。”
公司女神：“我有个上亿的项目，想不想聊聊？”
林峰对行业对手一路横推，成为了顶尖科技公司。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8fc66276b43a3c7f8c0fd95d68e78830","author":"小新是超能者","author_id":"","book_id":"7576134990182747160","book_name":"职场十倍返现嫌少？那是十倍利润","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2571人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7576134993596924440","read_count":"2571","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"393951"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"187","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,神豪,多女主,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/84fcc1835301e192c2533acd3bef91d7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779509270&x-signature=ulBm3RCLQc2d7gLtEm89kDhXS6w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"96819441148","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"229"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032412074954F5E3A266B88C520CCE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durat
